Yesterday, our kitchen quietly began its own journey across India; one simmer, one spice, one memory at a time.
It started with the bold thecha of Maharashtra, a flavour that never enters a room without announcing itself.
Then came the Haleem Rolls, borrowing their depth from Hyderabad’s centuries-old tradition of slow cooking.
Gujarat offered comfort with its soft, nostalgic Locho, while Kolkata inspired our Banana Blossom Satay, a thoughtful nod to the ever-loved mochar chop.
And finally, Bihar brought us the unhurried, earthy richness of Champaran Mutton, cooked the way stories are told; slowly, with heart.
Each dish holds a place, a memory, a journey. Now they gather together on one table, waiting to be discovered.
A gentle, delicious tour of India only at Monkey Bar Delhi.

This Earth Day, we’re not saving the planet—just making it more fun to drink on 🌍

Monkey Bar presents a lineup of zero-waste cocktails that are high on flavour, low on guilt, and crafted with conscious flair 🍀

Planet B – Gin, strawberry leather, citrus-saving acid blend.

Trash Me Not – Tequila, orange cordial, punchy brine, no-waste spice rim.

The Plum of All Parts – Plum in every form, shaken into a tart tequila mix.

Leave No Man-go Behind – Raw mango cordial + mezcal with a mango leather twist.

No lectures. No leftovers. Just great cocktails—served the Monkey way 🌱

Available from 22nd April -2nd May | Delhi & Mumbai

caption:
In continuing our 8 till Infinity celebrations, we have the pleasure of welcoming Rinse FM veteran @djoneman, a name forever etched into the story of radio. Oneman’s tryst with Rinse FM began nearly two decades ago, and alongside introducing the world to path-breaking sounds from the UK and well beyond, he’s cemented himself as one of electronic music’s most exciting DJs. Known for hammering through a wide palette of musical styles in a single outing, Oneman is set to join boxout.fm’s 8th birthday celebrations on Saturday, November 23 @monkeybarind. 

Doubling-down on our promise to showcase incredible DJs, both old and new, alongside Oneman, we welcome back longtime radio resident Rohan Kale aka @prismertraxx, this time under his Don Jiro avatar. Finally, tying up the program is the ever versatile @dr.psychmusic. 

It’s community up front and everything else in the back! Tickets available via @insider.in.

📍 Location: Monkey Bar, Vasant Kunj, New Delhi
🕗 Time: 8 PM - 1 AM

#8TillInfinity #boxoutfm #nocliquejustplay

Had a blast at @monkeybarind, where vibes are as refreshing as the food! 🥳✨ If you’re all about enjoying a chic yet relaxed atmosphere, this place hits the spot. From their Lentil Salad, Barley & Pomegranate Salad 🥗 to their iconic burgers 🍔 and flatbreads which are absolute must-tries. Everything we tried was bursting with flavor! 

And don’t miss out on their signature cocktails— Voodoo Child, Manga Mule 2.0 🥃 and Down & Dirty 🍸 These drinks add the perfect punch to your meal, blending familiar desi ingredients with a twist of boldness.

From delicious cocktails to irresistible bites, Monkey Bar serves up not just food, but an experience that keeps you coming back for more. Whether it’s a brunch date or evening hangout, this is the spot to unwind. 🥂
